offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, compliance documentation delays cause potential fines and project delays. We automate OSHA documentation preparation instead of manual documentation processes using spreadsheets and templates.
problem: Difficulty in preparing OSHA compliance documentation accurately and on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Share insights on Indie Hackers about compliance tools
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Engage in community forums for construction project management
try_it: Let users try template library for OSHA forms on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Gather 10 short interviews from target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for compliance tasks
Allow CSV import for existing OSHA data
Enable one-click export for compliance reports
